org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration

Class PolylineFigure

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.AbstractViewComponent
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.AbstractFigure
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration.DecorationFigure
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration.PolylineFigure
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ViewComponent>, Selectable, PropertyOwner, Figure, LinearFeature, ViewComponent, ViewComponentConstants, PropertyNames

    public class PolylineFigure
extends DecorationFigure
implements LinearFeature
    A decoration figure that is drawing a polyline.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      protected static class  PolylineFigure.PathDetails
      A container for a path and the tangents of the path ends.
      protected class  PolylineFigure.SPainter

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cleanUp()
      Clean this Fig and all its internal temprary fields.
      protected PolylineFigure.PathDetails computePath(List<? extends Point2D> controlPoints)
      Create and replies the general path that is representing this edge figure.
      boolean contains(float x, float y)
      Reply true if given coords are in the bounds of this Fig.
      boolean contains(Rectangle2f r)
      Reply true if the given rectangle is inside this component.
      protected LinearFeatureShadowPainter createShadowPainter()
      Invoked by AbstractFigure.getShadowPainter() when an instance of shadow painter must be create.
      void fitToContent()
      Change the size of this figure to fit its content as best as possible.
      boolean flatteningAt(int index)
      Try to remove the control point at the specified index if its removal does produce a large change in the polyline.
      UnmodifiablePoint2f getCtrlPointAt(int index)
      return the point of the path point edge defined by the parameter.
      int getCtrlPointCount()
      Return the number of point in the path of the edge.
      List<? extends Point2D> getCtrlPoints()
      Get the edge control points.
      DrawingMethod getDrawingMethod()
      Replies the method how the polyline edge is drawn.
      int getNearestCtrlPointTo(float x, float y)
      Replies the index of the nearest control point to the specified point.
      Point2D getNearestPointTo(float x, float y)
      Replies the point on the linear feature that is near to the given coordinates.
      int getNearestSegmentTo(float x, float y)
      Replies the index of the nearest segment to the specified point.
      Path2f getPath()
      Replies the general path that is representing this edge figure.
      PathIterator2f getPathIterator()
      Replies the path iterator of the edge.
      Map<String,Object> getProperties()
      LinearFeatureShadowPainter getShadowPainter()
      Replies the painter that may be used to paint this figure in shadow mode.

      Replies the definitions of the properties that may be edited through an UI.

      Replies the hit control point at the specified position.

      Replies the index of the nearest segment to the specified point.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PolylineFigure

        public PolylineFigure(UUID viewUUID)
        Construct a new figure.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.

      • PolylineFigure

        public PolylineFigure(UUID viewUUID,
              float x,
              float y)
        Construct a new figure.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.
        x - horizontal postition of the upper-left corner of this FigNode.
        y - vertical postition of the upper-left corner of this FigNode.

      • PolylineFigure

        public PolylineFigure(UUID viewUUID,
              float x,
              float y,
              float width,
              float height)
        Construct a new figure.
        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.
        x - horizontal postition of the upper-left corner of this FigNode.
        y - vertical postition of the upper-left corner of this FigNode.
        width - is the width of the figure.
        height - is the height of the figure.

      • fitToContent

        Description copied from interface: Figure
        Change the size of this figure to fit its content as best as possible.

      • contains

        public boolean contains(float x,
               float y)
        Description copied from class: AbstractViewComponent
        Reply true if given coords are in the bounds of this Fig. This function takes into account only the bounds of the figure.
        Specified by:
        contains in interface LinearFeature
        Specified by:
        contains in interface ViewComponent
        Overrides:
        contains in class AbstractViewComponent
        Parameters:
        x - horizontal coord.
        y - vertical coord.
        Returns:
        true if the point (x,y) is in this Fig.

      • contains

        public boolean contains(Rectangle2f r)
        Description copied from interface: ViewComponent
        Reply true if the given rectangle is inside this component.
        Specified by:
        contains in interface ViewComponent
        Overrides:
        contains in class AbstractViewComponent
        Parameters:
        r - a rectangle
        Returns:
        true if the given rectangle is inside this component; otherwise false.

        public boolean intersects(Shape2f r)

        Specified by:

        Overrides:

        Returns:

        Set the method how the polyline edge is drawn.

        method - is the type of the drawning method.

        public DrawingMethod getDrawingMethod()
        Replies the method how the polyline edge is drawn.
        Returns:
        the method used to draw this edge.

        Method to paint this Fig.
        Specified by:

        Parameters:
        g - the graphic context.

      • paintSegments

        protected void paintSegments(ViewGraphics2D g,
                 Path2f path)
        Paint the segments represented by the specified control points.
        Parameters:
        g - is the graphical context.
        path - is the path to draw.

      • hitCtrlPoint

        public int hitCtrlPoint(float x,
               float y,
               float epsilon)
        Replies the hit control point at the specified position. The control points at the ends of the edge cannot be hit.
        Specified by:
        hitCtrlPoint in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        x - is the position of the hit point.
        y - is the position of the hit point.
        epsilon - is the error amount allowed for the hitting test.
        Returns:
        the index of the control point that is hit; otherwise -1.
        See Also:
        LinearFeature.hitSegment(float, float, float)

      • hitSegment

        public int hitSegment(float x,
             float y,
             float epsilon)
        Replies the index of the nearest segment to the specified point.
        Specified by:
        hitSegment in interface LinearFeature
        epsilon - is the maximal distance from the point to the segment.
        Returns:
        the index of the nearest segment on the edge. It is always in [-1,LinearFeature.getCtrlPointCount()-2], where the value -1 is when there is no segment in the edge.
        See Also:
        LinearFeature.hitCtrlPoint(float, float, float)

      • flatteningAt

        public boolean flatteningAt(int index)
        Try to remove the control point at the specified index if its removal does produce a large change in the polyline. This function is useful to rmeove the control points that do not contribute enough to the shape of the edge.
        Specified by:
        flatteningAt in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        true if the control point was removed; false if it was not removed.

        public List<? extends Point2D> getCtrlPoints()
        Get the edge control points.
        Returns:
        control points of this edge.

      • getCtrlPointCount

        public int getCtrlPointCount()
        Return the number of point in the path of the edge.
        Specified by:
        getCtrlPointCount in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        an integer that is the size of the path.

      • getCtrlPointAt

        public UnmodifiablePoint2f getCtrlPointAt(int index)
        return the point of the path point edge defined by the parameter.
        Specified by:
        getCtrlPointAt in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        index - the index of the point from the path point edge to get. 0 corresponds to the sourcePortPoint and size-1 (where "size" denote the size of the path point list) the destination port point.
        Returns:
        coordinates of the control point.

      • removeCtrlPointAt

        public void removeCtrlPointAt(int index)
        Remove a point at the given index from the path.
        Specified by:
        removeCtrlPointAt in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        index - the index of the control point in the path.

      • setCtrlPointAt

        public void setCtrlPointAt(int index,
                  float x,
                  float y)
        Set the point of the path defined by the given index.
        Specified by:
        setCtrlPointAt in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        index - the index of the control point in the path.
        x - is new coordinate of the control point.
        y - is new coordinate of the control point.

      • insertCtrlPointAt

        public void insertCtrlPointAt(int index,
                     float x,
                     float y)
        Insert a point into the path defined by the given index.
        Specified by:
        insertCtrlPointAt in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        index - the index of the control point in the path.
        x - is the coordinate of the control point.
        y - is the coordinate of the control point.

      • computePath

        protected PolylineFigure.PathDetails computePath(List<? extends Point2D> controlPoints)
        Create and replies the general path that is representing this edge figure. It is recommended to invoke getPath() instead of this method.
        Parameters:
        controlPoints - are the control points that are composing the path.
        Returns:
        the general path.

      • getPath

        public final Path2f getPath()
        Replies the general path that is representing this edge figure.
        Specified by:
        getPath in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        the general path that is representing this edge figure.

        public final PathIterator2f getPathIterator()
        Replies the path iterator of the edge.
        Specified by:
        getPathIterator in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        the path iterator of the edge.

        Calculate the bounds of the edge and its associated symbols. This function invokes:

          • .

      • getNearestSegmentTo

        public int getNearestSegmentTo(float x,
                      float y)
        Replies the index of the nearest segment to the specified point.
        Specified by:
        getNearestSegmentTo in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        the index of the nearest segment on the edge. It is always in [-1,LinearFeature.getCtrlPointCount()-2], where the value -1 is when there is no segment in the edge.
        See Also:
        LinearFeature.getNearestCtrlPointTo(float, float)

      • getNearestPointTo

        public Point2D getNearestPointTo(float x,
                        float y)
        Replies the point on the linear feature that is near to the given coordinates.
        Specified by:
        getNearestPointTo in interface LinearFeature
        Parameters:
        x - horizontal location of the point.
        y - vertical location of the point.
        Returns:
        the nearest point on the linear feature, never null.

      • getNearestCtrlPointTo

        public int getNearestCtrlPointTo(float x,
                        float y)
        Replies the index of the nearest control point to the specified point.
        Specified by:
        getNearestCtrlPointTo in interface LinearFeature
        Returns:
        the index of the nearest control point on the edge.
        See Also:
        LinearFeature.getNearestSegmentTo(float, float)

        the instance of shadow painter.

      • getShadowPainter

        public LinearFeatureShadowPainter getShadowPainter()
        Replies the painter that may be used to paint this figure in shadow mode. You must call ShadowPainter.release() when you have finished to paint the figure in shadow mode.
        Specified by:
        getShadowPainter in interface Figure
        Specified by:
        getShadowPainter in interface LinearFeature
        Overrides:
        getShadowPainter in class AbstractFigure
        Returns:
        the painter, never null
